'''wapuru''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:vaalite|vaalite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-p-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vaalite|vaalite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| wapuru
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæpirith|wæpirith]] || [[word:wæpirij|wæpirij]] || [[word:wæpirish|wæpirish]] || [[word:wæpiri|wæpiri]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wapupuruth|wapupuruth]] || [[word:wapupuruj|wapupuruj]] || [[word:wapupurush|wapupurush]] || [[word:wapupuru|wapupuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wapuruth|wapuruth]] || [[word:wapuruj|wapuruj]] || [[word:wapurush|wapurush]] || [[word:wapuru|wapuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wapufruth|wapufruth]] || [[word:wapufruj|wapufruj]] || [[word:wapufrush|wapufrush]] || [[word:wapufruf|wapufruf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wapuruthu|wapuruthu]] || [[word:wapuruju|wapuruju]] || [[word:wapurushu|wapurushu]] || [[word:wapuruku|wapuruku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wapuruth|wapuruth]] || [[word:wapuruj|wapuruj]] || [[word:wapurush|wapurush]] || [[word:wapuru|wapuru]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wapuruthul|wapuruthul]] || [[word:wapurujul|wapurujul]] || [[word:wapurushul|wapurushul]] || [[word:wapurukul|wapurukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wapuruthuthu|wapuruthuthu]] || [[word:wapurujuju|wapurujuju]] || [[word:wapurushushu|wapurushushu]] || [[word:wapuruku|wapuruku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wapuruthun|wapuruthun]] || [[word:wapurujun|wapurujun]] || [[word:wapurushun|wapurushun]] || [[word:wapurukun|wapurukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wapuruthuoro|wapuruthuoro]] || [[word:wapurujuoro|wapurujuoro]] || [[word:wapurushuoro|wapurushuoro]] || [[word:wapurukuoro|wapurukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
